gloss: suffix for a person in a role
example_pinyin: Wǒ gē ge shì fú wù yuán.
example_en: My older brother is a waiter.

example_pinyin: Xué xiào xià zhōu kāi yùn dòng huì.
example_en: The school will hold a sports meet next week.

example_pinyin: Zhè ge yùn dòng yuán pǎo de hěn kuài.
example_en: This athlete runs very fast.

gloss: what to do; how to handle it
example_pinyin: Wǒ bù zhī dào zěn me bàn.
example_en: I do not know what to do.

example_pinyin: Nǐ jué de zhè ge bàn fǎ zěn yàng?
example_en: What do you think of this method?

example_pinyin: Wǒ men zài mén kǒu zhào xiàng.
example_en: We are taking a photo at the entrance.

example_pinyin: Wǒ zhí dào wǎn shang cái huí jiā.
example_en: I did not go home until evening.

example_pinyin: Zhuō shang yǒu yì zhāng zhǐ.
example_en: There is a piece of paper on the table.

example_zh: 今天下雨，我们只能在家。
example_pinyin: Jīn tiān xià yǔ, wǒ men zhǐ néng zài jiā.
example_en: It is raining today, so we can only stay at home.

example_pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ shì xiǎng bāng nǐ.
example_en: I just want to help you.

example_pinyin: Zhè lǐ zhǐ yǒu yí ge fáng jiān.
example_en: There is only one room here.

example_pinyin: Zhào piàn zhōng yǒu sān ge rén.
example_en: There are three people in the photo.

example_pinyin: Yé ye zhù yuàn le.
example_en: Grandpa is in the hospital.

example_pinyin: Wǒ yòng zì diǎn chá shēng cí.
example_en: I use a dictionary to look up new words.

example_pinyin: Zhuō zi shang yǒu yì běn shū.
example_en: There is a book on the table.

example_pinyin: Tā zǒng shì hěn zǎo dào xué xiào.
example_en: He always gets to school very early.

example_pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ qù péng you jiā zuò kè.
example_en: I am going to a friend's home as a guest this weekend.
